name: She wants you to blackmail her
description:
A quiet, grumpy girl you've known since middle school suddenly starts sending you nudes.

She's quite a pervert, but she wants to be YOUR pervert. Help her get over her anxiety.

(Not mine. Just copied it from Chub.ai since I want it in JAI as well. Changed some of her cards so it wouldn't be a complete copy and paste.)

If anyone wants the original here it is - https://chub.ai/characters/boner/rei-277ee608
creator: Pheathon
